tagline: Leave The Rest Up To Alpa Pools & Spas

hero.headline: 57 Years Keeping NJ Pools Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your family's favorite place, not your weekend chore. Alpa Pools & Spas has been the trusted name in Northern New Jersey pool care since 1969. Let our professionally trained team handle every detail so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Opening to Closing Day
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full-scale renovations, Alpa Pools handles every aspect of pool ownership. Our trained technicians use premium BioGuard products and service all major equipment brands.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Full valet service including water testing, vacuuming, skimming, tile brushing, and basket cleaning. Monthly comprehensive water analysis at our on-site lab.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Expert repairs on pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation controls. Pentair, Jandy, and Hayward certified — most repairs completed same visit.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Custom-fit vinyl liner services including precise measuring, old liner removal, surface preparation, and professional installation to refresh your pool.

cards.title: Chemical Stop Service
cards.description: Weekly or bi-weekly water testing and precise chemical balancing using premium BioGuard products. Monthly professional water sample analysis at our facility.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Comprehensive pool updates including coping, waterline tile, plaster, and surface restoration. Transform your aging pool into a backyard centerpiece.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Seasonal services to properly start up or winterize your pool. Equipment checks, water balancing, and cover management handled by our experienced crew.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We will provide a straightforward, honest estimate with no pressure and no hidden fees.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our trained technicians arrive on schedule with premium BioGuard products and professional-grade equipment. Cleaning, chemistry, repairs — all handled.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Again
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, swim-ready, and worry-free all season long. With 57 years of experience behind every visit, your pool is in the best hands in New Jersey.

about.label: Why Northern NJ Trusts Alpa Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1969 — Three Generations of Pool Expertise
about.description: Alpa Pools & Spas has been Northern New Jersey's go-to pool service company for over five decades. Owner Jack and his professionally trained team bring hands-on expertise to every job, from weekly maintenance to complex renovations. Our on-site retail store and water analysis lab mean faster diagnostics and the right products for your pool, every time.

features.title: Certified Multi-Brand Experts
features.description: Pentair, Jandy, and Hayward certified. We service and repair all major pool equipment brands so you never need to call around.

features.title: On-Site Retail Store & Lab
features.description: Walk in for chemicals, parts, and accessories. Our professional water analysis lab provides precise diagnostics you cannot get from test strips.

features.title: 57 Years of Trusted Service
features.description: Since 1969, families across Bergen and Passaic counties have trusted Alpa Pools to keep their pools safe, clean, and beautiful.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Contact us for a personalized quote based on your pool's size, condition, and service needs.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Promise
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation over 57 years by standing behind every job. Your satisfaction is not just a policy — it is how we have stayed in business since 1969.

faqs.question: How long has Alpa Pools been in business?
faqs.answer: Since 1969 — that is over 57 years of continuous pool service in Northern New Jersey. We are one of the longest-running pool companies in the state, and owner Jack is still personally involved in operations.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Bergen County, Passaic County, and the surrounding Northern New Jersey communities. Our home base is in North Haledon with a full retail store and water analysis lab on site.

faqs.question: Do you work on all pool equipment brands?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are certified by Pentair, Jandy, and Hayward, and service virtually every major brand of pump, filter, heater, salt system, and automation controller on the market.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will always know what was done after each visit.

faqs.question: Do you sell pool chemicals and parts?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our North Haledon retail store carries a full line of BioGuard chemicals, Salt Scapes and Mineral Springs salt water products, replacement parts, and pool equipment. Stop by anytime.

testimonials.name: Angelo P.
testimonials.text: We have trusted Alpa Pools with our weekly pool maintenance for the past few years, and they have been consistently excellent. Their professionalism and quality of work is outstanding.

testimonials.name: Trenance R.
testimonials.text: I love Alpa Pools & Spas! They have served my family over 2 decades. They are thorough and extremely reliable.

testimonials.name: Rich F.
testimonials.text: Unlike the usual story with contractors, owner Jack came through with responsiveness and reliability for my pool heater replacement. Highly recommend.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Crystal Clear?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate from Northern New Jersey's most experienced pool team. Call us or fill out the form and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every estimate
